sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tuipi luanglai khawlsak, Tuipi luanglai khawlsak;
Jesuh tawh om peuh leng, bangmah kihtak

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna tui hual in hong tuum a,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lungkiatna le launate in, ka lampi hong mialsak;
Kei hong kem hi, A itna in,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa aw, ka hun beikuan a, Na gam kong zuat laitak;
Na khut in kei hong len inla,
